title: Allo's Forever Pack
description: A personal modpack including client-side qol mods and optimizations.
body:
A personal modpack including client-side qol mods and optimizations, built for vanilla parity for worlds to be used for the years to come.

I made this pack for my "forever world", the world that I come back to when other mod packs aren't doing it for me. A world that will grow over the years with me.

I'll try to keep this up to date with the later versions of minecraft as mods permit.

This includes the Bliss Dev shaders that include Distant Horizons support located on their github here: [https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader)
